_comment: Ubuntu 22.04 LTS (jammy) cloud image -- apt FAMILY, debian-family (the consumer-supported). Mirrors the consumer ubuntu:22.04 container. PIN upstream_sha256 before building (fails closed until it matches): sha256 is published at https://cloud-images.ubuntu.com/releases/22.04/release/SHA256SUMS. Guest apt routes through the SSL-bump cache proxy; archive.ubuntu.com + security.ubuntu.com are allowlisted. Base packages only -- the consumer own installer pulls its deps.
